title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 18/21

transcript.text: Yeah so like 10th grade like what other classes well I had another class I had a geometry class
And that may have been in 10th grade and I got a b in that and I really liked geometry I really
Liked geometry class because it was like you get to draw shit and it was just interesting
So I had fun doing that I remember though I was in we went in to do a do a test and I took out
This like handkerchief that my mom had like dipped all these essential oils in because my mom was like
When you study for the test make sure you smell the handkerchief with like you know patchouli in it
So that so when you take the test take out the handkerchief and smell the handkerchief with
Patchouli and it'll help you remember what you were thinking about when you were studying for the test
You'll do better for the test so I go to the test and I take my handkerchief out and immediately
Everybody in the class is like whoa what the hell is that what the fuck and this kid behind me

And so like I balled it up and I threw it threw it at him and I'm like smell it yourself and he's like

Was like yeah dude put that away everybody can smell it but uh yeah but anyways um what other

In my entire life I was never asked to write anything in my entire life except until my very

I don't know if it was like that maybe it was just food poisoning but that's what I was that's

And he was a bike rooster but I never rode with him I I I only rode by myself when I rode so and I
